positive: Use Search Console data to find SEO opportunities for my site

near_neighbors.prompt: 用 Ahrefs 数据帮我分析竞品关键词
near_neighbors.expected: Do not route. This skill is for owned-site GSC data, not third-party SEO tools.

near_neighbors.expected: Route only if GSC query/page evidence is also part of the job; otherwise this is analytics work.
